effect.content: Primary: "Unlike other treatments for dermatomyositis (DM), which suppress the immune system generally, LISRAYA targets the root cause of the disease." Alt: "...LISRAYA works by turning off the specific inflammatory switches that are stuck in the 'on' position."

governance.preferred_form: Unlike other treatments for dermatomyositis (DM), which suppress the immune system generally, LISRAYA targets the root cause of the disease.

rule_text: Mechanism-of-action messaging must use the approved wording. Primary: "Unlike other treatments for dermatomyositis (DM), which suppress the immune system generally, LISRAYA targets the root cause of the disease." Alternate: "...LISRAYA works by turning off the specific inflammatory switches that are stuck in the 'on' position."
intent: Keep MOA claims within MLR-approved language.
summary: Mechanism-of-action messaging must use approved wording: primary "Unlike other treatments for DM...", alternate "LISRAYA works by turning off specific inflammatory switches.
